creator: rometravelers
caption:
Exploring Rome and its amazing history by @aktravells ✨🤩 Tag your favorite traveling partner! ❤️

💡2026 is officially the best year to visit Rome, with events like the Rome Marathon, summer concerts, and tennis tournaments making the city vibrantly alive. Wander the streets from the Colosseum to Piazza Navona and soak in history at every turn

transcription.text: I'm in a bad girl good mood, wearing my gold hoops, lining my lips right now in the rear view, baby, don't even play When you look at me like that in your cab
